Faced with years-long grid connection delays, developers are turning to on-site gas generation to bring projects online faster, creating a rapidly expanding market for turbines, engines, fuel cells and battery storage. summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer John Healey committed to disciplined control of Britain’s public finances to protect against economic shocks, as he made a pro-business pitch to the City of London on his third full day in post.

title: Oil Firms Warn Madagascar Plan May Spark Trade in Russian Fuel
